text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Fuji Kiseki and T.M. Opera O
chatting excitedly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Us, produce an original work together? Yes, that
sounds exciting!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I had a look at the script the other day, but what
should we do about the cast?

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! What a silly question! I shall be the lead, director, and producer all at once!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now that that's out of the way, we must decide
what to do with you, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You possess a beauty second only to mine, and
your performance skills can bedazzle any
audience!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: How do you plan to use your talents as a top star? That is the question!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Oh, stop it. You're making me blush with all
that praise.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Who should I play, then? Hm...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Trainer. Perfect timing. Who do you think I
should be?

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Fuji, I know he's your trainer, but he's the
paradigm of a random passerby right now.

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Fuji, I know she's your trainer, but she's the
paradigm of a random passerby right now.

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit reckless to hand over such an important
decision to an extra, don't you think?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Not at all. We've already decided that
you'll be playing the lead.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And if you're the lead, then we must figure out
what supporting role I should play to best draw
out your charms.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Doing so is the job of an entertainer!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: I think I see what you mean...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now, then! Who do you think I should play,
Trainer? Don't hold back, even if it feels like an
outrageous suggestion! ♪
choice_data_list: You should be the narrator and set the mood!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
What an unexpected casting choice! Do you have
any experience playing such a role, Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Not much, but I'll give it my all!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
If you'd like, we can try out a few lines right now.
Ahem...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my prince, tell me true—what meaning is
there to this thing we know as fate?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The gods trap us with chains they dub "fate" and
choose whom we must love... But how can love
truly exist where affection is forced?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Fie on the gods and their ties of fate! With mine
eyes have I seen your valorous visage, and with
mine ears have I heard your dulcet voice.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My lord, my faithful heart pines for your love and
would choose none other than you!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: M-my lady...

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If such chains do restrict you so, then with this
blade shall I sever them. Fear not, for no
tribulation will break my will.

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Lady, with our hearts as one, none can tear us
apart! This I do swear!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap! Wooo! That was amazing, you two!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm so caught up in their performance that I
applaud until my hands are sore.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! We've attracted quite a crowd. That was
stupendous.

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Heh. You were just as fantastic!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I really felt the way you drew out my best
performance just now.

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: You were such a darling and an amazing heroine!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki truly embodied her role as a gallant
princess. I don't know when this play is
happening, but I can't wait to watch it.

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The narrator?! That's hardly a role!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
You think? I think the narrator can be a pretty
significant part. Some plays revolve entirely
around them, in fact.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Here, let me try being the invisible presence that
stirs up our audience with no more than my voice.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Ahem...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Listen well, ye travelers of the night, to this tale
of the prince who would carve a path to glory
with his own might and blade...

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Wow! That narration is sending chills down my
spine! You're incredible, Fuji!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Tick-tock, the pendulum swings twixt glory and
demise as our hero prince forges on in blind
pursuit of power!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, that's good! My palms are sweaty with
anticipation for what comes next!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
He sprints onward, a gale of steadfast ambition.
His sights still set on the highest throne of the
land—that of the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Yes, yes, keep it up!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
No crook or bend in the path can slow his gait as
he charges on!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
B-but of course not! If the narrator says so, then
nothing can slow him!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Despite his exertions, he doth not perspire! Not a
single drop of sweat slicks down his forehead!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
That sounds highly unlikely, but maybe it's
possible! Yes, it may be!

text_block_list.name: T. M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Will our hero prince ever achieve his goal of
becoming the Overlord?! Well, that is something
only the wind knows... ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki seems to relish in spinning a new tale
out of thin air. I don't know when this play is
happening, but I can't wait to watch it.
